creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text: Upstream fixed this in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/69066ab31959968ebcbca71f3872bdedef8fb8cd, and I imported a later revision of llvm 18 in https://github.com/DimitryAndric/freebsd-src/commit/3b076e737af3b4ac1b7dc03bdd2b4cca9a0a9590 . After that, devel/llvm10 builds without the additional patch, so this bug is no longer needed.
